title: geracium viscidulum
intro: Geranium viscidulum, also known as sticky geranium or sticky leaf geranium, is a perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The plant's roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geranium viscidulum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Geranium viscidulum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
